title: Codex Official Relay Bridge
problem: codex-helper relays ordinary Codex Responses traffic but did not expose official-only Codex paths such as remote context compaction v1 through compatible relay providers.

continue_policy.notes: HTTP compact v1 bridge, diagnostics, static unsupported-relay fallback, review, and workspace gate are complete. WebSocket upgrade forwarding, remote compaction v2, and active compact probing/capability hints are follow-ons.
